visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up shot of a young woman with long, dark brown hair. She is wearing a light purple spaghetti-strap top and is looking directly into the camera. She has a finger placed near her mouth in a thoughtful or suggestive pose. The background is a slightly out-of-focus indoor room, appearing to be a bedroom or dressing area with shelves containing various items. (2) As she speaks, her facial expressions change subtly, with slight tilts of her head and shifts in her gaze. The lighting is bright and soft, highlighting her facial features. At one point, she leans her head slightly onto her hand while maintaining eye contact with the viewer. (3) The video continues with her talking directly to the camera in a selfie-style perspective. The camera remains static throughout the recording. The scene concludes with the screen fading to black.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 淦. [Subtitle]: 說真的我有想過要交女朋友欸. (2) [Subtitle]: 因為女生比較了解女生. (3) [Subtitle]: 有時後跟男生講話真的會吐血. (4) [Subtitle]: 那就會覺得可能跟女生在一起會比較舒服. (5) [Subtitle]: 可是跟男生在一起很舒服喔. (6) [Subtitle]: 男生其實也是有長處的. [Variety]: WOW. (7) [Subtitle]: 那個長處女生沒有.

The video relies on a linguistic pun regarding 'strengths' (長處), which in Mandarin can also be a double entendre for physical anatomy, ending the clip on a comedic note.
